description: Escalate the Compliance Finding 'Unpatched Legacy Payment Server' into the Risk Register by creating a new Risk titled 'Risk: Legacy Payment Server Vulnerabilities'. Use the description: 'The payment server runs an EOL operating system that cannot be patched. This increases the likelihood of compromise via known exploits. Retained due to legacy software dependency.' Assign High Likelihood and High Impact scores, and link the new Risk to the original 'Unpatched Legacy Payment Server' finding.
